completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith, 1 part, project_type_id=library, Python + MCP + tree-sitter
Found 5 existing docs: README.md, SECURITY.md, CLAUDE.md, ci.yml, 19 plan files in docs/plans/
Tech stack: Python 3.10+, MCP SDK, tree-sitter (15 langs), httpx, anthropic SDK, hatchling build, uv package manager
Exhaustive scan of all 93 files (41 src, 51 tests, 1 benchmark). 1772 symbols, 1073 tests (39% security).
Source tree analysis written with annotated directory structure, critical folders, entry points, key symbols, hotspots
Development guide written: prerequisites, install, env setup, run/build/test commands, CI/CD, git hooks, key patterns
Skipped: single-part project, no multi-part integration needed
Architecture doc written: 5-layer diagram, security model, data flow pipelines, PageRank metrics, complexity hotspots, design decisions
Supporting docs verified: all required files exist, N/A files correctly omitted for library type
Master index generated with quick reference, all doc links, existing docs, historical plans, getting started
Validation complete: all checklist items pass, no critical issues, state file updated

findings.project_classification: Monolith library, Python, MCP server with tree-sitter AST parsing, 93 files (41 src, 51 tests, 1 benchmark)

findings.exhaustive_scan: 41 source files across 5 subpackages. 1772 symbols, 1073 tests. Defense-in-depth security, declarative registries, 15-language AST, gzip indexes.

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. All 11 steps finished. 5 documentation files + 1 state file generated.
